sentences.english: I moved to a new apartment last month.
It took me three whole days to unpack all the boxes.
sentences.korean: 모든 상자를 푸는 데 꼬박 3일이 걸렸어요.

sentences.english: The new place is smaller but the location is much better.
sentences.korean: 새 곳은 더 작지만 위치가 훨씬 좋아요.

sentences.english: There's a subway station right outside, and a big supermarket just a five-minute walk away.
sentences.korean: 바로 밖에 지하철역이 있고 걸어서 5분 거리에 큰 슈퍼마켓이 있어요.

sentences.english: The only downside is that the walls are thin and I can hear my neighbor's TV at night.
sentences.korean: 유일한 단점은 벽이 얇아서 밤에 이웃의 TV 소리가 들린다는 거예요.
